title: Score carrier RFQ responses with procurement evidence
given: A tenant has an RFQ with at least two submitted carrier responses and one frozen booking/pricing snapshot from a quote response.
when: The user selects the RFQ and creates an allocation plan.
then: The assistant persists a transportation procurement plan with carrier scorecards, RFQ evidence, snapshot evidence, invoice feedback, and a recommended carrier allocation score.

title: Avoid blindly choosing the cheapest risky carrier
given: One carrier has the lowest all-in quote but weak snapshot coverage, late shipment history, or red invoice-audit feedback.
then: Cost, service, invoice, and evidence scores are shown separately, and the recommendation can favor a more reliable carrier.

title: Queue tender and allocation for approval
given: A transportation procurement plan has a recommended carrier and tender draft.
then: An assistant action queue item is created for carrier allocation approval, with no booking mutation, tender send, or external carrier communication performed silently.
